entity.summary: Global crypto platform whose current services include a spot exchange, crypto markets, wallets, conversion, staking, and payment processing.
entity.notes: The current first-party site exposes a live Spot Exchange, Crypto Markets, trading pairs, fees, market-maker and API links. Exact exchange launch date and a single country of origin are not asserted; the service is recorded with origin bucket Global.

evidence.title: Cryptomus Crypto Payment Gateway and Exchange access
evidence.notes: First-party page advertises Cryptomus Exchange and exposes current Spot Exchange, Crypto Markets, trading-pair, fee, broker, market-maker, and API links.

evidence.title: Cryptomus exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Discovery registry source identifies exchange id `cryptomus`; retained as secondary registry corroboration rather than current-status authority.
